Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.FunctionCallingConfigBuilder

  • Packages that use FunctionCallingConfigBuilder 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.

    • Uses of FunctionCallingConfigBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder that return FunctionCallingConfigBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      FunctionCallingConfigBuilder ModeBuilder.and()
      Sets the built Mode instance as the mode in the parent builder.
      FunctionCallingConfigBuilder FunctionCallingConfigBuilder.withAllowedFunctionName​(String allowedFunctionName)
      Adds an allowed function name to the list of allowed function names for the function calling configuration.
      FunctionCallingConfigBuilder ToolConfigBuilder.withFunctionCallingConfig()
      Creates a new FunctionCallingConfigBuilder for building the function calling configuration.
      FunctionCallingConfigBuilder FunctionCallingConfigBuilder.withMode​(Mode mode)
      Sets the mode for the function calling configuration.
      Constructors in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder with parameters of type FunctionCallingConfigBuilder 
      Constructor Description
      ModeBuilder​(FunctionCallingConfigBuilder functionCallingConfigBuilder)
      Constructor for the ModeBuilder.
